subcodes.first_line: O thou seeker after Truth! The statement of the Blessed Beauty which thou hast quoted doth supplement the verse
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب حقیقت آن عبارتی که مرقوم نمودی از جمال مبارک متمم ایه ایست که
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God
